plugins.name: x-skills
plugins.description: 16 intelligent skill routers + 1 external companion (x-skill-review) with optional multi-model orchestration via OpenCode and direct Gemini CLI. Plugin skills: x-do, x-research, x-review, x-verify, x-bugfix, x-mindful, x-design, x-api-pentest, x-qa, x-team, x-worktree (auto-applies docker-compose isolation when profile present), x-worktree-isolate, x-omo, x-gemini, x-guide, x-skill-improve.
